200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the Specialist sets a random enemy on fire. The burning enemy takes 75000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Specialist sets a random enemy on fire. The burning enemy takes 150000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Once in a while, the Specialist throws a fuel oil grenade hits an enemy, it explodes and stuns the target for 2 sec. The target and all enemies around it are covered in fuel oil. Their attack speed is reduced by 20% and their spell power is reduced by 15% for 5 sec. When an enemy covered in fuel oil is set on fire, they take additional physical damage equal to 15% of their max health every second for 3 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Specialists sets a random enemy on fire. The burning enemy takes 250000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 35% for 4 sec. Once in a while, the Specialist throws a burning fuel oil grenade at a random enemy. When the grenade hits an enemy, it explodes and stuns the target and all enemies in a small radius around it for 2 sec. The target and all enemies around it are covered in fuel oil. Their attack speed is reduced by 30% and their spell power is reduced by 25% for 5 sec. When an enemy covered in fuel oil is set on fire, they take additional pure damage equal to 15% of their max health every second for 3 sec. Additionally, when the grenades explodes, it sets all affected enemies on fire. The burning units take 300000 magic damage and their healing rate reduced by 45% for 5 sec. At the start of the battle, the Specialist is immune to debuffs for 5 sec. The Specialist and all allies restore equal to the additional damage dealt by the burning of the fuel oil. The healing is distributed evenly.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Specialist’s damage is increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter.

description 4/6

Specialist’s damage is increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter. Incoming damage to an enemy fighter covered in fuel oil is increased by 20%.

description 6/6

Specialist’s damage is increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter. Incoming damage to an enemy fighter covered in fuel oil is increased by 20%. When an enemy fighter under the fuel oil is set on fire, all enemy fighters in a small radius around it are set on fire too. Burning fighters take 150000 magic damage and their healing is reduced by 45% for 4 sec.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The Specialist’s physical armor and dodge are increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter.

description 4/6

The Specialist’s physical armor and dodge are increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter. Enemy fighters covered in fuel oil also have their damage reduced by 20%.

description 6/6

The Specialist’s physical armor and dodge are increased by 15% for each burning enemy fighter. Enemy fighters covered in fuel oil also have their damage reduced by 20%. The Specialist’s set ability healing is no longer distributed evenly. The Specialist and all allied units now regain health equal to the additional damage dealt by the combination of fuel oil and burn. But the health restored by the ability is reduced by 20%.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When the Specialist or any ally catches fire they have a 60% chance to remove that effect.

description 4/6

When the Specialist or any ally catches fire they have a 60% chance to remove that effect. The Specialist’s damage and pierce are increased by 10% for each enemy fighter covered in fuel oil.

description 6/6

When the Specialist or any ally catches fire they have a 60% chance to remove that effect. The Specialist’s damage and pierce are increased by 10% for each enemy fighter covered in fuel oil. When an enemy fighter is covered in fuel oil, he is unbalanced for 5 sec. He cannot dodge or make critical attacks during this time.

Materials

Temperature Sensor

Portal chest for very dark souls

Portal chest for very dark souls
